CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_content', false, '86dKNc-_V5SOALAxWDKDb2sO1Amm38e8uOIKCYEAK-Q', 'v3.5.0--cU1BtJ3IauSyXv4Yf95iSUxxk7Mqpj6Obmfl9L_j_lw', 'Dyx-5_GZWQzlgXg5XG4i0JAjYGg6NTcIbsOfNVMJoKY'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_content; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_content (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "externalUrl" VARCHAR NULL, "image" VARCHAR DEFAULT '', "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "tech" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_content'; -- meta
